title: Still Vanilla
description: A Client-side modpack for Minecraft 1.19.3 which aims for performance and qol while keeping the vanilla gameplay.
body:
A Client-side modpack for Minecraft 1.19.3 which aims for performance and qol while keeping the vanilla gameplay.

The pack contains 64 client mods to enhance your Minecraft experience!

[See here for the mods list.](https://modrinth.com/modpack/stillvanilla/version/1.19.3)
